name: New England Sports Hub
about: New England Sports Hub is a 135,000 square-foot indoor sports dome, operating as the largest facility of its kind in New England. It features a comprehensive golf offering with Trackman technology, including both a performance range and simulator bays. The venue also hosts a variety of youth and adult sports leagues, tournaments, and camps, alongside a full-service restaurant and concessions. While the website emphasizes premier technology and a family-friendly atmosphere, specific details on golf simulator capacity and pricing are not explicitly detailed.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology offering radar launch data
One of the first facilities in the U.S. with Trackman range and simulator
On-site private lessons and coaching available for improvement
Part of a larger sports complex, providing a full athletic experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant (Birdies Restaurant & Pub) and concessions area (The Short Stop) available on-site.
Alcohol is available at the on-site restaurant and pub.

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor technology integrated into the golf simulators and performance range.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs or call ahead to inquire about rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted inside the facility. Players and referees may bring one water bottle.

faq.question: How long does a typical 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated duration for an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, New England Sports Hub offers a wide range of youth programs, leagues, summer camps, and clinics, making it a very kid-friendly venue.
